channel.title: THE AMERICAN BLACKSTORY
channel.description: Trimmed fixture for curated community-feed and obscurity tests.

item.title: BLACK BAGS, Vol. 4 — Fanm Djanm
item.description: Brand storytelling spotlighting a Black-owned shop — low place-history signal for obscurity tests.

item.title: DAY 5 — Stormé DeLarverie
item.description: Stonewall veteran Stormé DeLarverie — a named historical figure with place context.

item.title: DAY 4 — The Buffalo Soldiers
item.description: Buffalo Soldiers in Yosemite and Hawaiʻi — well-attested subject that should score less obscure against a catalog that already knows them.

National Park Service — Yosemite

NMAAHC

NPS — Hawaiʻi Volcanoes

item.title: DAY 11 — The Rosewood School Bell, Piedmont County
item.description: A local school bell dedication in Piedmont County with few national identifiers — synthetic obscure local lead for scoring tests.
